name: Ordeal of a Traveler
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>旅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>試</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>練</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per battle, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can activate this effect; Your opponent chooses 1 random card in your hand and calls the card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap), and if they call it wrong, return the attacking monster to the hand.
eff: Once per battle, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can activate this effect; Your opponent chooses 1 random card in your hand and calls the card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap), and if they call it wrong, return the attacking monster to the hand.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 3: Yugi's World Mega Pack

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
